summary: Iteration 74 - TrendScout Homepage Improvement Testing Complete. All 14 existing smoke tests pass. All new homepage features verified via Playwright UI testing.

issues: Two footers visible - one from LandingPage.jsx (dark slate-950 bg) and one from LandingLayout.jsx (white bg). Minor redundancy, not blocking.

Says 'How It Works' and scrolls to #how-it-works
3 steps: Find products, Check potential, Launch faster

getShortReason() function nicely generates dynamic reasons based on product attributes
